title: ERCOT SPP Real Time 15 Min CSV download
description:
Settlement Point Prices in 15-minute intervals as reported by ERCOT in real-time. These are derived from LMPs as well as price adders to calculate prices used in settlements. SPPs are calculated for Resource Nodes, Load Zones, and Hubs.

The location types present are:

- *Trading Hub*
- *Load Zone Energy Weighted*
- *Load Zone DC Tie*
- *Resource Node*
- *Load Zone*
- *Load Zone DC Tie Energy Weighted*


💡 There are many fewer settlement point locations than buses. Keeping this in mind can help to slim down initial ERCOT analyses before turning to individual bus locations.
